title: No Firework Boosting
description: This mod makes it impossible to use fireworks rockets to fly with an elytra
body:
This mod makes it impossible to use fireworks rockets to fly with an elytra.

This mod can be installed on both the client and the server.

If this mod is installed on the server, players will not be able to fly with firework rockets, even when they don't have the mod installed.

If this mod is installed on the client, it will remove the swing animation when using a firework while flying. If the server doesnt have the mod installed, flying is still possible.
